categories.label: Influence
categories.description: Current Influence level on your House Card (race to 12)

categories.label: Gladiator Coin Values
categories.description: Sum of Coin Values of all your Gladiators (tiebreaker in tournaments)

categories.label: Equipment Coin Values
categories.description: Sum of Coin Values of all your Equipment cards (tiebreaker in tournaments)

categories.label: Favour Tokens
categories.description: Favour tokens on your Gladiators (each worth 2 Coins tribute per Arena phase)

categories.label: Champion Tokens
categories.description: Champion tokens on your Gladiators (worth 6 Coins tribute and +1/-1 Influence)
